responseMessageContents.title: Improved owner login security and added a text-based recovery option.
responseMessageContents.description: We updated the system to allow the owner to log in manually using an email and password. We also added a security feature that allows the owner to recover their account through a text message code if they forget their password. Additionally, a new security log has been created to track all login recovery attempts to keep the account safe.
